arts.ttl: Arsenal thrash Tottenham in north London derby
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly makes her debut in a second spell with the Gunners as Arsenal thrash Spurs 5-0 in the north London derby at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Spurs vs Man Utd team news LIVE!
arts.sum: A Man Utd fan since birth, Jake gives his thoughts on their hopes for Sunday's game as well as United's season, Ruben Amorim and where Kobbie Mainoo will end up after his False 9 experiment last time out. To view this content you can use the button below to allow Spreaker cookies for this session only.

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp blasts Daniel Levy's 'lack of winning culture' and claims Tottenham's chairman is 'HAPPY' because of the smash success of his £1.2bn multi-use stadium... hours before fans' biggest ever protest
arts.sum: Redknapp believes a lack of 'winning culture' is to blame for the club's failures as Levy is satisfied with financial success off the pitch.

arts.ttl: Here we go! Man Utd 'make Osimhen offer' as 'DEAL CLOSE'
arts.sum: Osimhen has no shortage of suitors and reliable Turkish journalist Yagiz Sabuncuoglu claims that both Man Utd and PSG have made verbal contract offers for the striker ahead of the summer. Manchester United have made a verbal offer to Victor Osimhen, who is on the verge of making a career-defining move, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Man United prepared to pay £62.5m for “top player” with 22 goals in 21 league games
arts.sum: Manchester United are looking to improve their attacking unit with the signing of Viktor Gyokeres from Sporting CP. The 26-year-old is one of the best strikers in the world, and he has scored 34 goals in all competitions this season. arts.sum: Manchester United are dealing with an extensive injury list as they head to the English capital to face Tottenham Hotspur

arts.ttl: Why Kai Rooney loves another club despite dad Wayne's legendary Manchester United status
arts.sum: Kai Rooney is currently progressing his football career with Manchester United but his affection for another Premier League club is clear

arts.ttl: Jamie Redknapp makes gloomy prediction on how long it will take Ruben Amorim to stop Man United's 'pain'... and insists they must still 'get rid' to change culture
arts.sum: United are languishing in 14th place after a dire start to Amorim's tenure, having picked up four wins from his 13 top-flight games in charge.

arts.sum: Crystal Palace defender Marc Guehi has been linked with a move away from the club in recent months. The 24-year-old central defender was linked with a move away from the London club during the January window as well, and it appears that top clubs are ready to return for him in the summer.
